headline: Clear calendar and no inbound fires — use today to drive the 'Generated Evaluations: No Ground Truth' design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce auth credentials (check SALESFORCE_* env vars) so escalation visibility is restored
quick_wins.why: You're flying blind on customer escalations until this is fixed

quick_wins.task: Fix Snowflake credentials (password empty) to restore metrics dashboards
quick_wins.why: Metrics for the Agents MBR dashboard and OKR tracking are inaccessible

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the design doc for AE-1079: Generated evaluations — clarify no ground truth
must_make_progress.why: This is your only active Jira ticket and directly ties to the Evals deliverable called out in the Big Rock OKRs (key 26.4+ deliverable). No due date means it can slip silently — don't let it.

must_communicate_with.about: Align on 'no ground truth' evaluation approach, get input or review on design doc draft for AE-1079
Salesforce and Snowflake credential failures — request password resets or token refresh

must_report_status.topic: Evals workstream progress (generated evaluations, no ground truth)
must_report_status.to: Agents leadership (likely Adrian or Marius based on OKR structure)
must_report_status.note: Next bi-weekly TR will expect an update; have a shareable draft or status by then

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations or high-priority cases. Fix urgently.
Snowflake metrics connection is down (empty password) — cannot track MBR dashboard, funnel health, or telemetry OKRs.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of silent drift on a key evals deliverable. Consider setting a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the Big Rock OKRs — monitor for any escalation that may pull you in.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring observability (Salesforce, Snowflake) and advancing the evals design doc that underpins a key 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake credentials; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the most impactful adoption-driving work today.

slack_summary: Clear day with no meetings or inbound fires — best use of time is driving the 'Generated Evaluations: No Ground Truth' design doc (AE-1079) forward. Two urgent housekeeping items: Salesforce and Snowflake credentials are both broken, leaving you blind on escalations and metrics — get IT to fix today. Zero meetings on the calendar.
